lines.speaker: Timble
lines.text: Good Day, how can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was just wondering what you were up to.

lines.speaker: Timble
lines.text: I work for Aluft Aloft Gnome Food Delivery Service. It's a growing business you know. We get more customers every day!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So do you have any spare jobs then?

lines.speaker: Timble
lines.text: Aluft Gianne jnr. is in charge - he'll be able to help you.
